name: Siple's Garden Seat's Curry of Seafood Chad Richard
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the mayonnaise and chutney together in a bowl.
2. Add the lemon juice and curry powder to the mixture. Blend well until combined.
3. Refrigerate the sauce mixture.
4. Cook the fettuccine according to package directions.
5. In an ovenproof dish, combine the cooked fish (shrimp, scallops, and langostini) with the cooked fettuccine.
6. Stir in 12 ounces of the chilled sauce until well combined.
7. Store any leftover sauce in the refrigerator for future use.
8. Bake the dish in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 8 to 10 minutes.
